step.description: Step is a unit of execution.

name.description: Name is a unique identifier for this step.

env.description: Env is a map of environment variable names to string values.

inputs.description: Inputs is a map of step input names to structured values.

step.description: Step is a reference to another step to invoke.

exec.description: Exec is a command to run.

steps.description: Steps is a list of sub-steps to run.

script.description: Script is a shell script to evaluate.

action.description: Action is a GitHub action to run.

outputs.description: Outputs are the output values for a sequence. They can reference the outputs of sub-steps.

delegate.description: Delegate selects a step by name which will produce the outputs a run.

reference.description: Git a reference to a step in a Git repository.

gitReference.description: GitReference is a reference to a step in a Git repository containing the full set of configuration options.

command.description: Command are the parameters to the system exec API. It does not invoke a shell.

work_dir.description: WorkDir is the working directly in which `command` will be exec'ed.
